subject: fix(debug): boot pill clear also removes error listeners + guards null reason
body:
Two small tightenings to the pre-React boot pill:

1. __debugClearLoadTimer now also removes the window.error and
   unhandledrejection listeners it registered. Previously they stayed
   live post-mount, so any runtime error would re-trigger the red
   banner alongside DebugPill's own error-count badge (double-
   surfacing the same event, with inconsistent UX). Boot pill is for
   *boot* failure visibility — DebugPill handles runtime.
2. unhandledrejection handler falls back to 'Unhandled rejection'
   when e.reason is null/undefined, instead of showing the literal
   string "undefined" / "null".

Handlers extracted to named function expressions so removeEventListener
can target them.

tsc --noEmit: 0 errors. jest: 63/63. expo export --platform web: clean;
built dist/index.html contains the two removeEventListener calls.

Tags: debug, bugfix, boot
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 1
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: debug-pill-hardening
Semver: patch

title: boot pill clear also removes error listeners + guards null reason
